speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bina shikayat kiye duty nibhani hai
text: Aaj subah jab main laptop bag pack kar rahi thi, Sasu-maa ne fir taana maara ki unki beti working hokar bhi poora ghar akele sambhalti hai. Main dual burden se itni thak chuki hoon ki dimaag sunn ho jata hai, par 'cannot afford to stop' wali halat hai kyunki ghar aur office dono mujh par dependent hain. Mujhe bas akele mein apne aansu pochne hain aur bina shikayat kiye duty nibhani hai taaki sasural ka routine na bigde.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her deep sense of responsibility and role preservation using Lens B.
text: Tumhari baaton se lag raha hai ki poore sasural aur office ko sambhalne ki zimmedari tumne apne upar le rakhi hai, taaki kisi ko koi pareshani na ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, agar main ruk gayi toh subah ka breakfast aur office ki meetings dono miss ho jayenge. Mujhe lagatar dono front par apna best dena hi hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the continuous, unending timeframe of her daily labor using Lens D.
text: Subah se lekar raat tak lagatar bina ruke, tum in do alag alag duniya ko ek sath chalane mein lagi rehti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, apne liye time hi nahi milta. Aur itna sab karne ke baad bhi sasu-maa khush nahi hoti. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai kya sach mein meri hi aadat kharab hai jo main unki beti jaisa sab kuch perfectly nahi kar pa rahi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirroring the relational strain and self-doubt using Lens C, pausing gently to address the stigma cue.
text: Apno se aisi baatein sunkar thoda akela aur kamzor mehsoos hona laazmi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot akela lagta hai. Ghar aur office dono jagah se expectations aati rehti hain, aur main bas machine ki tarah tasks poore kar rahi hoon. Ek choti si galti aur sasural mein bada tamasha shuru ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her underlying fear of routine breaking and ensuing conflict using Lens E.
text: Is baat ka darr bana rehta hai ki kahin thodi si bhi chook hui, toh poore ghar ka santulan bigad jayega aur tano ka silsila aur badh jayega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bina shikayat kiye duty nibhani hai
text: Haan, aur main afford nahi kar sakti ki sasural mein koi tamasha ho ya meri manager mujhe unprofessional samjhe. Isiliye dimaag sunn hone par bhi, mujhe uthna hai aur har roz bina shikayat kiye duty nibhani hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a gentle question to probe the emotional cost of holding both worlds together.
text: Jab dono jagah ki expectations poori karne ka itna bhari dabaav hota hai, toh us waqt tumhara apna sukoon kahan chala jata hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Mera apna koi sukoon bacha hi nahi hai. Bas ek loop mein fassi hui hoon. Ek taraf office ke targets hain, dusri taraf sasural ki izzat aur unke rules. Main inke beech poori tarah fans gayi hoon aur thak gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the core feeling of exhaustion and being trapped by the dual burden.
text: Mujhe lagta hai ki is khatam na hone wale dual burden ki wajah se tum andar hi andar behad exhausted aur fasa hua mehsus kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein itni thakan hai ki kabhi kabhi lagta hai main gir jaungi. Par sasu-maa ko lagta hai office jana toh aaram ka kaam hai, aur asli mehnat toh sirf unhone ki hai apne time pe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her exhaustion within the systemic context of working bahus in Indian society.
text: Hamare samaj mein working bahuon se ghar aur bahar dono jagah perfect hone ki umeed karna bohot aam hai, aur is vajah se tumhari thakan puri tarah jayaz hai; tumhara lagatar koshish karna tumhari taqat dikhata hai, na ki koi kami.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baat sunkar thoda halka lag raha hai. Mujhe lagta tha ki main hi weak pad rahi hoon jo dono chizein smoothly nahi handle kar pa rahi. Laptop kholte waqt bhi kitchen ka tension dimaag mein chalta rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a brief systemic anecdote about the unspoken pressures of being a working woman in India.
text: Working women ki life mein yeh pattern aam hai—ki meeting ke beech bhi sabzi ka khayal aaye, sirf tumhara nahi, lekin log aapas mein bolte nahi kyunki sabko ek superwoman dikhna hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi superwoman banne ke chakkar mein meri apni health jaa rahi hai aur dimaag sunn ho raha hai. Mujhe ab is exhausting loop se nikalne ke liye kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, aap batao kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, <10 min actionable steps that don't add to her duties.
text: Agar hum choti si shuruat karein, toh kya tum subah laptop kholne se pehle 5 minute akele baith kar chai pi sakti ho, ya office commute ke waqt bas shant reh kar apni pasand ka kuch sun sakti ho bina kisi kaam ke baare mein soche?

speaker: Seeker
text: Subah akele chai peena toh impossible hai sasu-maa ke uthne se pehle kyunki unka routine disturb hoga. Par haan, jab main cab se office jati hoon, woh 15 minute mere apne hote hain. Main wahan thoda shant baith sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking her step-by-step through utilizing her cab commute for mental rest.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki kal jab tum cab mein baitho, toh phone par emails check mat karna, sirf earphones lagana aur aankhein band karke woh 15 minute bas shanti se saans lene par dhyan dena... bas itna hi kal ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bina shikayat kiye duty nibhani hai
text: Yeh main kar sakti hoon. Cab mein baith kar kam se kam mujhe tano ki aawaz toh nahi aayegi. Aisa lagta hai ki mujhe life bhar aise hi bina shikayat kiye duty nibhani hai, par shayad yeh 15 minute mujhe thodi energy de de.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframing of the taunts as a product of older generational expectations, not a reflection of her performance.
text: Yeh samajhna zaroori hai ki sasu-maa ke taane darasal unki apni ummedon aur purane waqt ka nateeja hain, yeh is baat ka proof bilkul nahi hai ki tumhare dual kaam mein koi kami hai ya tum duty theek se nahi nibha rahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main samajh rahi hoon. Unka zamana alag tha jab auraton ko bahar jakar yeh dual burden nahi jhelna padta tha. Par fir bhi chubhta toh hai jab woh meri office ki poori mehnat ko ek taane mein bilkul zero kar deti hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the hurt of unacknowledged effort using Lens C.
text: Jab din raat ek karne ke baad bhi sasural mein tumhari office ki mehnat aur lagan ki kadr nahi hoti, toh andar ek gehri chot lagti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, par main unko badal nahi sakti. Mujhe ab unki baaton ko dil par lena kam karna hoga, warna mera hi dimaag sunn rahega. Kam se kam main kal se cab mein apne dimaag ko thoda shant karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking her to visualize the impact of her new commute strategy.
text: In cab ke 15 minute mein shanti se baithne par, jab tum office pahunchogi toh tumhare meeting aur aage ke kaam ke mood mein kya badlav aayega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad main office mein thodi zyada present rahungi aur mind thoda clear rahega. Abhi toh main itni frustrated enter karti hoon ki choti si baat par bhi irritation hone lagti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the frustration as structural lack of transition time.
text: Darasal yeh irritation dual burden ka ek natural hissa hai jahan tumhare dimag ko reset hone ka waqt nahi milta, isliye yeh chota sa commute break us structural exhaustion ko todne ka ek badhiya tarika hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe hain aap. Mujhe kabhi kisi ne bola hi nahi ki dimaag ko reset hone ka waqt chahiye hota hai. Main toh bas subah se ek target se dusre target ki taraf bhagti rehti hoon ghar se office tak.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Praising her practical approach to creating mental space without disrupting family duties.
text: Tumne jis tarah se apni in dono zindagiyon ki takleef ko samjha aur apne liye bina ghar ki routine bigade ek chota sa rasta nikala, woh tumhari maturity aur samajhdari dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Mujhe sach mein lag raha tha ki main is pressure mein bilkul tut jaungi. Par ab lagta hai ki inhi choti choti chizon se main apna din achhe se manage kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her shift toward finding small pockets of time using Lens D.
text: Din bhar ki us continuous bhaag-daud mein, ab tum apne dimaag ke liye ek chota sa thehraav laane ke bare mein soch pa rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, thehraav bohot zaroori hai. Warna machine pakka band ho jayegi. Kal subah chahe sasu maa uth kar phir se wahi taane shuru karein, main apna cab wala waqt aur apni thakan ka dhyan rakhungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her acceptance of the feared situation while maintaining her new strategy using Lens E.
text: Is darr ke beech ki tano ka silsila shayad kal bhi waisa hi rahega, tumne us takleef se khud ko thoda alag rakhne ka mazboot irada kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Woh bolti rahengi, unka svabhav ban gaya hai waise hi react karne ka. Mujhe bas apne shanti par focus karna hai thoda sa, jitna ho sake is halat mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her commitment to duty while integrating mental rest using Lens B.
text: Bina apne kisi farz ko kam kiye, tumne apna kaam aur apni jimmedariyan poori karne ke saath saath khud ki is thakan ko bhi samajhne ka tay kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, farz toh poora karna hi hai, main usse peeche nahi hat sakti aur ghar ka routine bigadne nahi de sakti. Par haan, ab apne dimaag ki shanti ke baare mein bhi at least thoda sochungi cab wale waqt mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her enduring strength and new balanced perspective.
text: Tumhara yeh naya approach dikhata hai ki kitne mushkil halat mein bhi, tum apne office ke targets aur sasural ki izzat ko barkarar rakhte hue apni himmat nahi har rahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapse baat karke aakhri mein bohot theek mehsus ho raha hai. Kam se kam koi toh hai jo meri is roz ki dual mehnat ko bina taane maare samajhta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final closing affirmation summarizing her resilience.
text: Mujhe khushi hai ki tum is poore dual burden aur un lagatar tano ke beech mein apni is sachchi mehnat ko dekh paayi, yeh tumhara apna hausla hai jo aage roz kaam aayega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: agar main thak kar baith gayi toh 'log kya kahenge' ki nayi bahu nakhre kar rahi hai, isliye mujhe ek masheen ki tarah bas chalte rehna hai
text: Agar main thak kar baith gayi toh 'log kya kahenge' ki nayi bahu nakhre kar rahi hai, isliye mujhe ek masheen ki tarah bas chalte rehna hai. Sasu-maa ne aaj mehmaano ke samne meri nanad ki tareef ki aur mujhe sunate hue kaha ki career wali bahuyein ghar ke sanskar bhool jati hain. Mera promotion due hai par is guilt aur pressure se mera dimaag phata ja raha hai, fir bhi main apne suppressed ambition ko daba kar chai-nashta bana rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her role and duty frame, capturing how she suppresses her ambitions to keep up the appearance of a good bahu.
text: Tumhe lagta hai ki is ghar ki nayi bahu hone ke naate, chahe tumhare sapne kitne bhi bade hon, 'log kya kahenge' ke darr se tumhe sirf ek masheen bankar ghar ki duty poori karni padegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur agar maine job par focus kiya, toh bolenge ki main selfish hoon. Sab mujhe hi buri nazar se dekhenge ki career ke chakkar mein family ko ignore kar rahi hai. Isliye main apni office calls bhi chup kar karti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirror the feared consequence to address the stigma cue.
text: Yeh darr ki log tumhare career ko selfish aur parivar ke khilaf samjhenge, tumhe apne hi kaam ko chupane par majboor kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational dynamic where she feels alone and unseen by her husband.
text: Jab dono taraf ka pressure ho, aur husband se support ke bajaye sirf 'adjust karne' ko mile, toh poori responsibility akele uthana kitna bhari padta hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: agar main thak kar baith gayi toh 'log kya kahenge' ki nayi bahu nakhre kar rahi hai, isliye mujhe ek masheen ki tarah bas chalte rehna hai

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about how she manages the clash between her internal aspirations and her daily mechanical routine.

speaker: Seeker
text: Jagah bachti hi kahan hai? Jab raat ko laptop kholti hoon pending kaam ke liye, tab tak aakhein band hone lagti hain. Par main apne kaam ko let go nahi kar sakti warna sasu-maa ko lagne lagega ki unki baat sach sabit ho gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying exhaustion hidden beneath the fear of disappointing the family.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha, yahi dar mujhse raat-raat bhar kaam karwata hai aur subah uth ke sabke liye nashta banane pe majboor karta hai. Exhaust toh main sach mein hoon par bol kisse sakti hoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her effort and normalise the distress within the cultural context of working women.
text: Ek working bahu hone ka yeh double burden, jahan bahar ka ambition aur ghar ke sanskar dono ko akele balance karna pade, sach mein thaka dene wala hota hai. Tum dono jagah apna best de rahi ho, aur is physical aur mental thakan ke liye tumhe khud par koi guilt mehsoos karne ki zarurat nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you, par lagta hai ki shayad mujhme hi koi kami hai jo main dono manage nahi kar pa rahi without breaking down. Sasu maa bolti hain nanad toh sab manage karti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirror the stigma and self-doubt triggered by constant comparison.
text: Lagaatar kisi aur se compare hone par insaan ko apne andar hi kami nazar aane lagti hai, aur lagta hai ki jaise galti meri hi hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: agar main thak kar baith gayi toh 'log kya kahenge' ki nayi bahu nakhre kar rahi hai, isliye mujhe ek masheen ki tarah bas chalte rehna hai
text: Haan... wahi doubt andar se kha jata hai. Lekin main ab is guilt aur thakan mein masheen ki tarah nai reh sakti. Kuch toh raasta nikalna padega taaki mera promotion na chhut jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote normalizing the struggle of managing work and traditional roles.
text: Nayi bahu aur working professional ka yeh phase jahan 'sanskar' aur 'career' ke beech double guilt diya jaye, bohot common pattern hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi jaldi bolega nahi kyunki society ladkiyo ko chup-chap sehne ki salah deti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye adjust karne wala cycle toh kabhi khatam nahi hoga. Par mujhe sach mein abhi apna career bachana hai, batao main is routine ke beech apne promotion par kaise focus karu?

strategy_intent: Offer 2 actionable steps that fit within her immediate duty schedule without requiring permission.

Jaise, kitchen band hone ke turant baad sidhe 15 minute ke liye bina phone ke shanti se bed par let kar apni aankhein band karna, ya phir kal subah uthte hi sabse pehle apni sabse zaruri office presentation ka ek chota hissa 10 minute mein complete kar lena.

speaker: Seeker
text: Subah jaldi presentation ka ek hissa khatam karne wala idea sahi lag raha hai. Us waqt ghar mein baaki sab so rahe hote hain, toh shanti rehti hai aur mujhe chupana nahi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide her step-by-step to start with the chosen morning routine.
text: Pehle kal subah apna regular alarm lagana… phir kitchen mein jane se pehle apni laptop screen on karke sirf us 10 minute mein presentation ka woh hissa likhna… bas itna hi kal ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: agar main thak kar baith gayi toh 'log kya kahenge' ki nayi bahu nakhre kar rahi hai, isliye mujhe ek masheen ki tarah bas chalte rehna hai

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer a systemic reframe on the pressure from family regarding working bahus.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about how she will anchor herself to this new thought during her morning routine.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: aadarsh bahu ka farz nibhane
text: Energy toh bachi hi nahi hai. Bas ek autopilot par ek machine ki tarah chal rahi hoon. Kabhi kabhi toh dar lagta hai ki aadarsh bahu ka farz nibhane ke chakkar mein main apna astitva hi na kho doon, main poori tarah blank ho chuki hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence of losing herself to validate the deeper anxiety under her autopilot mode.
text: Kahin is autopilot mode aur apni iss double shift ki daud mein, tum apne aap ko hamesha ke liye na bhool jao, yeh dar tumhare dil mein bas gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul sahi kaha aapne. Main itni thak gayi hoon ki bas rona chahti hoon. Agar main break maangungi toh ghar wale kahenge ki natak kar rahi hai office se bachne ke liye. Mere paas koi option nahi bacha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the core emotions of exhaustion and helplessness emerging from the dual burden.
text: Aisa lagta hai ki is double duty ke bojh aur constantly judge kiye jaane ke darr mein, tum ek aisi jagah phans gayi ho jahan se nikle bina bas EXHAUSTION aur ek bahut gehri HELPLESSNESS mehsoos ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, I feel completely trapped aur exhausted. Meri colleagues jab weekend pe relax karti hain, toh mujhe sasural ka pichle hafte ka bacha hua kaam khatam karna padta hai. Mujhe laga tha working hone se respect milegi, par izzat sirf jhaadu-bartan se hi judi hai yahan.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated her feelings as culturally normal for working women, separating her worth from familial approval.
text: Tumhara yeh helplessness feel karna bahut hi natural hai. Apne samaj mein working bahuon se hamesha ghar aur bahar dono ko perfectly sambhalne ki unreal umeed ki jati hai, lekin in sab taano ka matlab yeh nahi ki tumhari us mehnat ki value sach mein kam hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: aadarsh bahu ka farz nibhane
text: Aapki baat sun kar thoda validation lag raha hai. Par soch kar dar lagta hai ki kya aage poori zindagi yahi chalega? Aadarsh bahu ka farz nibhane ke liye apne aap ko nichodte rehna?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Briefly disclosed a systemic anecdote about working daughters-in-law to normalise her unseen struggles.
text: Working bahuon ke case mein ghar ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye apni energy completely drain kar lena bahut common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka struggle nahi hai yeh, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki humein yahi chup-chap sehne ko sikhaya gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Toh main sach mein akeli nahi hoon is dual shift waali ladai mein. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... main bas physically aur mentally thoda theek hona chahti hoon, is saans-rokne wali routine se khud ko handle karne ka koi raasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided a systemic reframe to normalise her exhaustion as a structural issue rather than a personal failing.
text: Bahar se society ne ghar ki auraton par role itna bada kar diya hai taaki purane structures chalte rahein, isliye tumhe jo yeh akelepan ka bojh lag raha hai, woh tumhari fault nahi balki ek aisi structural expectations ka pressure hai jo kabhi realistic thi hi nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Unrealistic expectations... haan. Main apna time aur career khud hi invalid maan leti thi kyunki saas kabhi appreciate nahi karti. Toh main apni bachi-kuchi sanity bachane ke liye exactly kya try kar sakti hoon abhi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggested two minimal, non-disruptive coping options fitting her busy schedule.
text: Agar time bilkul nahi milta, toh hum bahut choti aisi cheezon se shuru kar sakte hain jisse tumhara kaam disturb na ho. Ya toh subah uthne ke baad bas 5 minute ki chay akele piyo bina kisi phone ke, ya phir office se aate waqt cab mein 10 minute ankh band karke relax karo. In dono mein se kya feasible lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Subah toh kitchen mein ghuste hi chai banti hai sabke liye, wahan akela time mushkil hai. Par cab wala safar mere control mein hota hai. Office se ghar aate waqt cab mein 10 minute khud ko disconnect karna manageable lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Executed one small suggestion step by step to help her implement the cab relaxation.
text: Pehle cab mein baithte hi apna laptop bag thoda door rakh dena aur phone silent kar lena... phir ankh band karke bas ek gehri saans lena aur apne kandhon ko dheela chod dena... bas itna hi aaj ke liye safar mein karna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aise sochne mein hi thoda relaxing lag raha hai. Aisa karne se shayad main apni shift 1 (office) aur shift 2 (sasural) ke beech ek chota sa buffer create kar loon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the benefit of the buffer time to reinforce the value of her mental break.
text: Ek chota sa mental break, ya buffer, sach mein un dono shifts ki demands ko alag rakhne mein ek bohut achhi shield ka kaam karega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha, ek shield. Kyunki agar main ghar thoda calm hoke ghusungi, toh saas ke comparison wale taane shayad utne zor se hit na karein. Pehle se exhausted hone par ek chota sa comment bhi bahut pain deta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored her fear of the mother-in-law's taunts breaking her remaining strength.
text: Sach mein jab thakan pehle se itni bhari hui hoti hai, toh yeh dar rehta hai ki ek choti si chubhne wali baat bhi din bhar ki bachi hui har taqat ko khatam kar degi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: aadarsh bahu ka farz nibhane
text: Exactly. Mere pati bhi kabhi in baaton par dhyaan nahi dete. Unhe lagta hai maa ne thoda gusse mein bol diya toh kya hua. Toh mujhe khud ke andar hi taqat jhutani padti hai, apna aadarsh bahu ka farz nibhane ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the feeling of isolation caused by her husband's invalidation.
text: Tumhare pati ka is tarah se us dard ko normalise kar dena shayad tumhe andar hi andar ek bahut gehri loneliness feel karwata hoga, jahan tumhe akela hi sahara banna padta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lonely toh lagta hai, par dhire dhire is loneliness ki aadat si pad gayi hai. Aisa lagta hai bas poora din daud kar kisi tarah raat ho jaye aur main apne bistar par so saku, wahi mera aaram hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the temporal longing for the day to end as her only source of relief.
text: Jaise taise poora lamba din nikal jaye aur raat ke us aakhiri pahar mein neend ka thoda sa aaram mil sake, aajkal bas yahi ek umeed bachi rehti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Shayad kal office se aate waqt woh 10 minute ka cab wala disconnect mujhe raat hone se pehle thoda sukoon de de. Main poori koshish karungi usko karne ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirmed her right to take a break and validated her courage in claiming that time.
text: Apne aap ke liye yeh choti si koshish karne ka decision lena bahut badi himmat hai. Samaj chahe is dual struggle ko credit na de, par khud ko thoda sa aaram dene ka haq tumhe poori tarah hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haq toh hai. Us waqt sirf mera control hoga us car ki seat par. Wahan koi manager nahi hoga aur koi saas nahi hogi, sirf main hungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the significance of her personal space free from systemic demands.
text: Wahan us chote se safar mein kisi ke bhi demands nahi honge, bas ek tumhara apna personal hissa hoga jahan koi aapse kuch nahi maang raha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kahun toh aaj aapse aisi khul kar baat karne ke baad mujhe as if finally laga ki mera dard banawati nahi hai. Mere andar ki thakan sach mein genuine hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored her relief in having her exhaustion validated as a genuine reality.
text: Tumhe bas is baat ki gawah ki zaroorat thi ki yeh jo exhaustion tum roz uthati ho, woh bilkul real aur haqeeqat hai, koi kamzori nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you mujhe samajhne ke liye. Ab mujhe uth kar sabke liye dinner ki tayari shuru karni hai, par aaj main bhari mann se nahi jaungi. Ab dil mein thodi halki feeling hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored her physical relief as she transitions into the evening duties.
text: Ab dinner banate waqt andar se utni ghutan aur ghabrahat nahi hogi, kyunki dil ko aaj bolne ke baad waqayi ek thahraav mil gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji bilkul. Office wali working aurat bhi insaan hoti hai, ab aage se jab saas bolengi toh main is baat ko dhyan mein rakh kar hi react karungi. Alvida aur shukriya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassured her of her resilience and affirmed the genuine difficulty of her dual roles.
text: Mujhe bahut khushi hai ki aaj tum ek halka mann lekar kitchen mein ja rahi ho, humesha yaad rakhna ki tum apni duty bohut bakhubi nibha rahi ho, apna ache se khayal rakhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakne ki izazat nahi hai
text: Sasu-maa ne aaj fir yaad dilaya ki caste mismatch aur career gap ke bawajood unhone mujhe apnaya, jabki unki beti apne sasural mein kitni sarvgun-sampann aur adjust karne wali hai. Ek taraf bacchon ka pressure aur dusri taraf office ke targets, main is dual burden ke bojh tale ghisi ja rahi hoon par thakne ki izazat nahi hai. Main akele bathroom mein 5 minute ro kar wapas bahar aati hoon taaki apni duty poori kar saku aur ghar mein koi naya kalesh na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame and bathroom crying as a stigma response.
text: Aapko bathroom mein akele rona padta hai taaki bahar aakar sabki umeedein aur apni duties poori kar sakein, bina kisi kalesh ke...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar maine apna stress dikhaya toh saas bolegi ki she is failing at both home and work. Office mein appraisal pass hai, manager target meet karne ka pressure daal raha hai. Ghar aati hoon toh kitchen aur bacchon ka homework. Yeh sab manage karna meri primary responsibility hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the continuous cycle of time between office pressure and evening home responsibilities.
text: Subah office ke appraisal aur targets ka stress, aur shaam ko ghar laut-te hi kitchen se lekar bacchon ki primary responsibility, yeh cycle roz chalti rehti hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakne ki izazat nahi hai
text: Bilkul roz ka routine hai. Kabhi lagta hai ek din ki leave le loon, par phir sochti hoon ghar pe rahugi toh aur zyada taane sunne padenge caste mismatch wale. I have to keep proving that I am worthy of this family. Mere paas sach mein thakne ki izazat nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the fear of being deemed unworthy and facing taunts if she rests.
text: Aisa mehsus hota hai ki chhutti lene se sukoon ki jagah ulta yeh darr rehta hai ki aapko taane milenge aur is parivaar ke liye aapki worth par sawal uthaya jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh problem hai. Main chidchidi ho gayi hoon. Kal raat maine apne chote bete pe bina baat ke chilla diya kyunki wo khana nahi kha raha tha. Andar se I felt so guilty. Phir I cried again in the bathroom. Koi meri taraf nahi dekhta ki main kahan se toot rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address mild risk warmly, mirror the isolation and relational strain with the son.
text: Apne bacche par chillane ke baad jo guilt feel hota hai, wo bohut bhaari hota hai. Aisa lag raha hai jaise aap sabko sambhal rahi hain, par aapki takleef dekhne wala aas-paas koi nahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakne ki izazat nahi hai
text: Sahi kaha. Mere husband bhi busy rehte hain. Unko bolungi toh wo kahenge ki job chhod do, par wo financial independence bhi toh zaroori hai. Mujhe dono jagah perfect hona hai. Ek aam bahu ki tarah sarvgun-sampann aur office mein best employee. Mujhe thakne ki izazat nahi hai, I have to manage.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probe the need to be perfect in both domains.
text: Jab dono jagah perfect hone ka itna bada pressure aap khud par rakhti hain, toh din ke aakhir mein khud ke liye kya bachta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kuch nahi bachta. Bas ek ajeeb si khali-pan aur exhaustion. I just feel like a machine. Duty subah se raat tak chal rahi hai. Phir wahi repeat. Main phas gayi hoon is race mein aur isse nikalna namumkin sa lag raha hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the core emotion of exhaustion beneath the duty based coping.
text: Lagta hai duty nibhaate nibhaate ek gehri exhaustion aa gayi hai, jahan aap sirf doosron ki umeedein poori karne wali machine ban kar reh gayi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakne ki izazat nahi hai
text: Haan, machine is the right word. Aaj sasu-maa ne meri nanad ki itni tareef ki ki usne sasural mein sab adjust kar liya. I felt so small, jaise meri mehnat ki koi value hi nahi. But I wiped my tears, chalo beta target meet karna hai, thakne ki izazat nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate dual burden exhaustion as culturally normal, separating worth from outcome.
text: Working women se aksar yeh umeed ki jati hai ki wo ghar aur office dono jagah bina thake 100 percent dein, jo ki insaan ke liye physically impossible hai. Sasu-maa ki baaton se hurt hona bahut swabhavik hai, lekin unka taana aapki mehnat ya aapki asli value kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sunkar accha laga ki kisi ne meri side dekhi. Caste mismatch ki wajah se meri shadi shuru se hi unki aankh mein chubhti thi. Main unki 'ideal bahu' ke sanchay mein fit nahi baithti, chahe main kitna bhi kyu na kar loon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Follow stigma protocol with a short relational mirror.
text: Chahe aap kitna bhi adjust kar lein, aisa lagta hai unka 'ideal bahu' wala benchmark aapke liye hamesha reach ke bahar rakha gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly! Aur us target ko reach karne mein meri health kharab ho rahi hai. Back pain rehta hai desk par 8 hours baithne se. Phir uthkar dinner banana, it is too much. Par koi rasta nahi dikhta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Brief systemic anecdote about working DILs.
text: Working daughters-in-law ki life mein yeh double duty wala pattern bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein superwoman banne ka pressure itna zyada hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Superwoman banne ke chakkar mein main real mein ek weak person ban gayi hoon. Back pain aur constant anxiety mujhe andar se tod rahi hai. Ab samajh nahi aa raha kya karoon, koi raasta hai kya theek hone ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe normalizing the pressure.
text: Tumhara weak feel karna personal failure nahi hai, balki is dual burden ke structure ka nateeja hai jahan ghar ke traditional rules aur modern office targets ek sath takraate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, shayad yeh structure hi unfair hai. Lekin main sab chhod toh nahi sakti na. My kids need me, and my career is my identity. Bas batao kya karoon taaki is kalesh aur exhaustion se thodi relief mile.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Give 2-3 small completable options within duty frame.
text: Duties poori karne ke beech, hum 2 chhote steps try kar sakte hain. Pehla, bathroom break ko 5 ki jagah 10 minute kar lo, wahan rone ki jagah bas deeply saans lene ke liye. Dusra, office aur ghar ke transition ke waqt 5 minute akele balcony mein chai pee lo bina phone check kiye. Kaun sa better lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Dono acche hain, par bathroom wala zyada practical hai kyunki wahan koi sawal nahi poochega. Balcony mein akele dekh kar sasu-maa poochengi ki khana kyu nahi ban raha. Main saans lene wali technique try kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Step by step breakdown of the chosen suggestion.
text: Pehle yeh karo, bathroom lock karke aankhein band karo... phir 4 count in aur 6 count out ki saans lo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karna hai us break mein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay, 4 count in and 6 count out. Yeh main handle kar sakti hoon. Isse kisi ko shak bhi nahi hoga aur main thoda recharge ho jaungi apne targets ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the practical integration of the coping tool into her duties.
text: Yeh chhota sa break aapki duties ke raste mein nahi aayega, balki ulta aapko apne office ke targets aur bacchon ke liye energy dega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Waise, meri maa bolti hain ki therapy wagerah try karoon, par saas ko pata chalega toh kahengi ki humne beti ki shaadi kisi weak ya mental ladki se kar di. Kalesh alag level par hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma of therapy softly and mirror the fear of a bigger conflict.
text: Agar therapy ka zikra hua, toh darr hai ki mental health ko ek bimaari ka tag mil jayega aur ghar mein kalesh control se bahar ho jayega...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, isliye main professional ke paas nahi ja sakti. Aapse baat karke halka lag raha hai. Mujhe lagta hai ki breathing exercise mujhe immediate stress relief degi jab bhi saas ki baatein trigger karengi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer another low-profile suggestion.
text: Mujhe khushi hai ki yahan baat karke halka lag raha hai. Ek aur choti cheez jo therapy nahi hai, wo hai 'brain dump'. Kya aap raat ko sone se pehle apne phone ke notes app mein apne din ka gussa type karke delete karna chahengi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Phone notes wala idea safe lag raha hai. Type karke delete kar do toh koi footprint nahi rahega. Aur sasural walo ko lagega main office ka kuch check kar rahi hoon. It is perfect.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the safe outlet within her role.
text: Is tarah se aap apna gussa bhi nikal paayengi, aur bahar se aapki zimmedariyan ya 'office work' mein koi interruption ya kalesh ka chance nahi rahega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Mere bacchon ko bhi meri zarurat hai, main unpe apna stress pass nahi karna chahti. Ek sarvgun-sampann bahu chahe na ban paun, but I want to be a patient mother and a focused employee.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her redefined goals apart from the taunts.
text: Aapka yeh sochna ki taano ke bawajood aapko apne bacchon ke liye patient rehna hai, aapki bohut badi strength dikhata hai. 'Sarvgun-sampann' ka tag na bhi ho, phir bhi aap ek behtareen maa aur dedicated professional hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Aisa perspective pehle kabhi socha nahi tha. Main bas duty pe duty kiye ja rahi thi. Ab lag raha hai un 5 minutes ke breaks aur notes mein likhne se kuch toh control wapas aayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time control aspect.
text: Lamba safar tay karte hue, yeh chote 5 minute ke breaks aur raat ka waqt ab aapke apne control mein rahenge, bina kisi ki dakhal-andazi ke.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bina kisi ki dakhal-andazi ke... that sounds beautiful. Mere office ka time ho raha hai, mujhe login karna padega. Aaj ka din utna bhaari nahi lag raha jitna subah lag raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the decreased fear of facing the rest of the day.
text: Subah jo bojh aur aage ka darr lag raha tha, login karne se pehle ab thoda kam lag raha hai aapko.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakne ki izazat nahi hai
text: Haan, ab thoda clear hai. Agar sasu-maa phir kuch bolengi, toh main bathroom break le lungi saans lene. Thakne ki izazat nahi hai, par 5 minute saans lene ki izazat toh main khud ko de hi sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validation affirming her agency within her role constraints.
text: Yeh bilkul sahi kaha aapne, khud ko 5 minute thehar kar saans lene ki ijazat dena aapka haq hai, aur isi se aap apne bacchon aur career, dono ke liye majboot khadi reh payengi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega, yeh dar mujhe rukne nahi deta. Aaj Sasu-maa ne meri choti si galti par nanad ka example de diya. Main job aur ghar dono sambhalne ke chakkron mein mentally aur physically poori tarah nichudi ja chuki hoon, par kal ki meeting aur subah ke nashte ki taiyari mein lag gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the duty language framing to show understanding of her dual burden.
text: Ghar ka nashta aur office ki meeting, dono aap akele handle kar rahi hain kyunki aapko lagta hai ki aap ruke toh sab bikhar jayega. Ek naye ghar mein duty poori karte hue apni jagah banana aasan nahi hota.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Bilkul aasan nahi hai. Office mein client calls handle karne padte hain aur ghar aate hi chup chaap saari demands poori karni padti hain. Maike ko chhodne ka adjustment shock abhi kam bhi nahi hua tha, par duty toh karni padegi warna wahi hoga ki mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the feared consequence of failing her duties and facing further criticism.
text: Aap apna poora 100 percent de rahi hain, phir bhi dimaag mein lagatar yeh pressure rehta hai ki choti si kami reh gayi toh wapas wahi taane aur criticism jhelna padega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Koi nahi dekhta ki main kaisa feel kar rahi hoon. Andar hi andar itna resentment feel hota hai na, par is structural endurance ko apni kismat maan kar aansu nigal rahi hoon. Mujhe pata hai mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega, isliye chup rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asked an open question to explore how she holds the immense resentment and exhaustion alone.
text: Yeh thakawat aur resentment aap akele hi bardasht kar rahi hain. Jab job aur ghar dono sambhalte hue aap poori tarah nichud jati hain, toh is andar ke gusse ko roz kaise hold karti hain?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Bas ignore karke. Agle din ki to-do list dekhti hoon. Ab kal client call hai aur subah jaldi uth kar sabke liye nashta banana hai. Yehi meri life hai ab. I just have to keep going, is bhaari pan ke saath.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the unending time constraints and how she manages her duration of daily obligations.
text: Aapne apni poori zindagi ko agle din ki duty aur taiyariyon ke time-table se itni sakhti se baandh liya hai ki aapke paas thamne ka ya feel karne ka waqt hi nahi bacha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Aur koi raasta bhi toh nahi hai. Agar main bimar bhi padh jaaun, toh taane maare jayenge ki maike mein kuch sikhaya nahi. Pata nahi kab tak aise chalega, bahut akela aur suffocating lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the relational element of how her actions are tied to her parents' reputation.
text: Aapke upar lagatar yahi bojh rehta hai ki aapki kisi bhi choti si chook ka seedha asar aapke maike ki izzat par aayega, jiski wajah se aap chup hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Haan, meri chook par meri parvarish ko suna dete hain. Mujhe bahut resentful feel hota hai is injustice par, par main react nahi karti. Sochti hoon shayad sab working aurton ko aise hi manage karna padta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Named the underlying exhaustion and feeling of being trapped in this continuous cycle.
text: Lagta hai is dual-duty ke chakkar mein aap poori tarah se thak chuki hain, jahan sab aapki service dekhte hain par aapki mehnat nahi, aur aap is cycle mein khud ko fasa hua pa rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Exactly! Main andar se poori tarah fas chuki hoon. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai bas ek off le loon office se, par phir wahi khayal aata hai ki mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega. Toh bus laptop khol kar baith jati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used self-disclosure to normalize her experience systemically among working daughters-in-law.
text: Working bahuon ki life mein yeh double shift aur performance ka pressure bahut common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samajhte hain ki aisi chup chap mehnat karna hi duty hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Bilkul sahi. Is ideal performance ke pressure ne mujhe suffocate kar diya hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main is gusse aur thakawat ka kya karoon. Main aise hi chalti rahi toh toot jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirmed her frustration as valid and separated her self-worth from her domestic performance.
text: Aapka yeh gussa aur frustration bilkul human aur jayaz hai. Ek metro city ki fast life mein job aur ghar ko akele chalana draining hota hai, aur aapki worth sirf is baat se tay nahi hoti ki aap tiffin kitna perfect banati hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Yeh validation sunkar sach mein thoda relief mila. Par mujhe samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... main ise aise hi continue nahi kar sakti. Koi chota step batao kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offered two small, actionable suggestions that fit within her limited time and space.
text: Yeh acha hai ki aap ab thoda pause lena chahti hain. Hum do simple steps try kar sakte hain: Pehla, office nikalne se pehle 5 minute washroom mein khud apni saans par dhyan dena. Dusra, nashte aur meeting ke beech ek cup chai sirf apne aaram ke liye peena. Dono mein se kaunsa feasible lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Washroom wala 5 minute break zyada practical hai. Wahan koi nahi tokega ki kya kar rahi ho, aur na hi wahan demands hongi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walked through the execution of the selected 5-minute breathing exercise step by step.
text: Pehle yeh washroom wala break hi rakhte hain. Kal subah jab taiyari mein overwhelm mehsoos ho, toh bas washroom jaiye... aankhein band karke do lambi saans lijiye... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Theek hai, main yeh zaroor karungi kal. Kam se kam un 5 minutes mein mujhe kisi ko please nahi karna hoga. Main bas khud ko sambhalungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided systemic information to help reframe the criticism as structural rather than personal.
text: Yeh yaad rakhna zaroori hai ki naye rishton mein jo expectations aur criticism milte hain, woh aksar unke apne set patterns hote hain, iska aapki mehnat ya aapke maike ki value se koi direct lena-dena nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Main sach mein sab kuch apne upar le rahi thi, khud ko hi galat maan rahi thi. Yeh reframe karke dekhungi toh shayad gussa thoda manage ho paye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored her intent to create some distance between her work and the domestic judgment.
text: Aap apne office ke routine aur unke taanon ke beech apne mental space ko thoda dur rakhna chahti hain, taki unki baaton ka asar aapki peace par na pade.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Haan, main nahi chahti ki main poori zindagi bas yahi line repeat karti rahoon ki mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega. Mujhe apne mental peace ke liye thoda space chahiye, chahe woh sirf 5 minutes hi kyun na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected her growing need for autonomy and space to exist without constant pleasing.
text: Lagta hai ab aapko is lagatar bhagam-bhag mein apne wajood ke liye ek chota sa break chahiye, jahan aap sirf ek employee ya bahu na bankar, bas insaan ban sakein.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Sahi kaha. I want to feel human again. Yeh machine ban kar jeena, jahan meri bas service count hoti hai, mere liye bahut draining ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassured her that needing space to breathe without guilt is entirely normal and valid.
text: Bina kisi guilt ke apne liye space maangna sabka haq hai. Aap itni saari expectations ka bojh akele utha rahi hain, aapka yeh suffocation poori tarah normal aur valid hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Thanks. Yeh sunne ki mujhe bahut zaroorat thi. Pehle lag raha tha shayad meri hi adjustment capacity kam hai. Kal ka 5 minutes plan pakka karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored her commitment to taking a small amount of time for herself moving forward.
text: Aapne itne lambe samay tak sab kuch apne upar sahne ke baad, kal se apne liye thoda waqt nikalne ka mazboot irada kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Haan. Aur agar sasu-maa ne kal bhi kuch bola, toh main react karne ke bajaye apne nashte par focus karungi. Unki criticism ko apni identity se attach nahi karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asked an empowering question to help her visualize preserving her peace in a tough moment.
text: Agar kal unka wahi taana dobara sunna pade, toh us bhaari moment mein aap khud ko protect karne ke liye andar hi andar kya bolengi?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Main khud ko kahungi ki meri mehnat kaafi hai, aur unka bolna meri maa-baap ki sikh ko chota nahi karta. My peace matters more than proving them wrong.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored her reframed sense of duty towards her own mental peace and career.
text: Aapki primary responsibility ab sirf ghar aur office ko perfectly run karna nahi, balki apni mental energy aur apni dignity ko sambhal kar rakhna bhi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Yes, exactly. Thoda control waapas milne jaisa lag raha hai. I don't have to absorb every taana. Ek invisible limit set karni padegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gently suggested a long-term professional resource while acknowledging the cultural stigma.
text: Main ek aur suggestion de sakti hoon aage ke liye. Kisi professional counselor se baat karna India mein shayad thoda bada step maana jata hai, par working bahuon ke liye yeh safe space bahut helpful ho sakta hai. Yeh sirf tab, jab aap comfortable ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Counselor wali baat thodi ajeeb lag rahi hai... log kya kahenge ki main pagal ho gayi hoon ya thoda sa adjustment handle nahi kar pa rahi? Uska cost aur time alag problem hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used a short restatement ending in a soft pause to respond to the stigma cue without pushing.
text: Aapko fikar hai ki log isay aapki nakami ya weakness samjhenge, aur isliye yeh raasta abhi theek nahi lagta...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera ek din ka break bhi sab kuch bikhra dega
text: Haan, abhi toh main ye 5 minute wali practice se hi shuru karungi. Woh zyada do-able hai aur kisi ko pata bhi nahi chalega. I am feeling slightly better.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirmed her readiness to start with a small, positive step despite the challenging environment.
text: Mujhe khushi hai ki kal ki office meeting aur ghar ke tension ke beech, aap ek positive step lene ko taiyar hain. Ek chote step se aage badhna hamesha achi shuruwat hoti hai.
